input.title: GHK-Cu peptide stimulates type I collagen synthesis in human dermal fibroblasts
input.abstract: Human dermal fibroblasts (HDFs) were treated with GHK-Cu (copper tripeptide-1) at 0.1, 1, and 10 µM for 72 hours. Type I collagen synthesis, measured by hydroxyproline assay, increased dose-dependently (1.6-, 2.3-, and 3.1-fold vs vehicle; p<0.01 for all). qPCR confirmed upregulation of COL1A1 and TIMP1. No cytotoxicity was observed at any tested concentration. GHK-Cu appears to drive fibroblast collagen production in vitro.
